A '''Desilijic scout ship'''{{'s}} crew discovered the ruined [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] of [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]] and reported its demise to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], who had invested in the pirate ship. This caused Jabba to renew the bounty on [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 37}} {{1st}}
